mainText: Today's top stories: Claude Code runs GitHub repo's hidden malware without, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box, Only three AI models finished above starting capital, Samsung and SK Hynix plan $590 billion chip, Computer vision deployments drive retail productivity gains, Omio scales travel product development using OpenAI models, Anthropic drops ‘workplace AI agents’ directly inside Slack, Samsung opens ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex access after
